components.name: json-error-recovery
components.notes: Added as post-tool hook (priority 150) in ErrorRecoveryHooks. Detects JSON parse errors in tool output and appends corrective guidance.

components.name: thinking-block-validator
components.notes: Added inline in prompt.ts after Plugin.trigger messages transform. Ensures assistant messages start with reasoning part for Anthropic extended-thinking models. Uses model.capabilities.reasoning + api.npm check.

components.name: task-resume-info
components.notes: Added as post-tool hook (priority 210) in ErrorRecoveryHooks. Extracts session ID from task output and appends resume hint.

components.name: read-image-resizer
components.notes: Resizes images read via Read tool to avoid context bloat. Parses PNG/JPEG/GIF/WebP dimensions from headers.

components.name: hashline-edit
components.notes: Alternative edit tool using line hash anchors instead of line numbers. Complex tool with many submodules. Would need significant adaptation.

components.name: session-manager
components.notes: Tools for listing/reading/searching/deleting sessions. Useful but needs OpenCode session API integration.

components.name: model-fallback
components.notes: Falls back to alternative model when primary model fails. Needs provider infrastructure review.

components.name: runtime-fallback
components.notes: Falls back to alternative runtime when primary fails. Related to model-fallback.

components.name: auto-update-checker
components.notes: Checks for OMO package updates on session start. OMO-specific, may need adaptation for OpenCode.

components.name: agent-usage-reminder
components.notes: Reminds model about available agents. OMO-specific agent ecosystem.

components.name: category-skill-reminder
components.notes: Reminds model about available skills/categories for task delegation. OMO-specific.

components.name: interactive-bash-session
components.notes: Hook for interactive bash session management.

components.name: slashcommand
components.notes: OMO slash command discovery. We have our own skill system.

components.name: call-omo-agent
components.notes: OMO-specific agent caller. Not applicable to our architecture.

components.name: start-work
components.notes: OMO-specific ultrawork/worktree workflow. Not applicable.

components.name: ralph-loop
components.notes: OMO-specific ralph agent loop. Not applicable.

components.name: no-sisyphus-gpt
components.notes: OMO-specific model restriction. Not applicable.

components.name: no-hephaestus-non-gpt
components.notes: OMO-specific model restriction. Not applicable.

components.name: prometheus-md-only
components.notes: OMO-specific agent constraint. Not applicable.

components.name: sisyphus-junior-notepad
components.notes: OMO-specific agent notepad. Not applicable.

components.name: atlas
components.notes: OMO-specific atlas agent hook. Not applicable.

components.name: non-interactive-env
components.notes: OMO-specific non-interactive env detection.

components.name: auto-slash-command
components.notes: OMO-specific auto slash command detection.

components.name: background-notification
components.notes: OMO-specific background notification.

components.name: claude-code-hooks
components.notes: OMO-specific Claude Code hooks integration.

components.name: hashline-edit-diff-enhancer
components.notes: Companion hook for hashline-edit tool. Skip unless hashline-edit is adopted.

components.name: hashline-read-enhancer
components.notes: Companion hook for hashline-edit tool. Skip unless hashline-edit is adopted.

components.name: tasks-todowrite-disabler
components.notes: OMO-specific TodoWrite disabling.

components.name: task-reminder
components.notes: Reminds model about pending tasks.
